title: More Equipment
description: A mod with many equipment added
body:
A mod developed for Minecraft Forge.Added more equipment so that you can make better equipment.The more equipment mod is currently at the beginning of development, and there are many functions that are not perfect. Please understand.

# Features
- Added emerald sword, tools, and armor.

# Future plans
- Let these equipment be generated in the structure
- Add villagers to trade these equipment
- Add more equipment
- Add compatibility with some mod (e.g. Jei)

# Compatibility
There are no known conflicts with other mods and it's unlikely there will be any. If there are any incompatibilities don't hesitate to [email me](mailto:nono135246@126.com).

# Reporting Bugs
[email me](mailto:nono135246@126.com).
